[HOST_1]#show run
Building configuration...

Current configuration : [SIZE_1] bytes
!
version 15.2
service timestamps debug datetime msec
service timestamps log datetime msec localtime show-timezone
service tcp-keepalives-in
service tcp-keepalives-out
no service finger
no service tcp-small-servers
no service udp-small-servers
no service pad
hostname [HOST_1]
enable secret 5 [SECRET_1]
username [USER_1] privilege 15 secret 5 [SECRET_1]
banner login ^C[BANNER_1]^C
ip domain name [DOMAIN_1]
no ip source-route
no ip domain-lookup
no ip identd
no ip mask-reply
ip ssh version 2
logging buffered 32768 informational
logging trap informational
logging [IP_1]
ntp peer [IP_1]
ntp source Loopback0
ip access-list standard VTY-MGMT
 permit [IP_1] [WILDCARD_1]
access-list 10 permit [IP_1] [WILDCARD_1]
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 description [DESC_1]
 no ip directed-broadcast
 no ip proxy-arp
 no ip redirects
 no ip unreachables
line vty 0 4
 access-class VTY-MGMT in vrf-also
 exec-timeout 10 0
 login local
 transport input ssh
line vty 5 15
 access-class 10 in
 exec-timeout 5 30
 login local
 transport input none
snmp-server view [VIEW_1] iso included
snmp-server community [COMMUNITY_1] view [VIEW_1] RO VTY-MGMT
no ip http server
no ip http secure-server
no ip bootp server
no cdp run
end

[HOST_1]#show version

ROM: Bootstrap program is [BOOTSTRAP_1]
Processor board ID [SERIAL_1]

[HOST_1]#show ip interface brief
Interface              IP-Address      OK? Method Status                Protocol
GigabitEthernet0/0     [IP_1]          YES manual up                    up
GigabitEthernet0/1     unassigned      YES unset  administratively down down
Loopback0              [IP_1]          YES manual up                    up

[HOST_1]#show users
Line       User       Host(s)              Idle       Location
*  2 vty 0     [USER_1] idle                 00:00:00   [IP_1]

  0    0 CTY              -    -      -    -    -     0      0     0/0       -
  2    2 VTY              -    -      -    -    -     1      0     0/0       -

    Console logging: disabled
    Monitor logging: level debugging, 0 messages logged
    Buffer logging: level informational, 15 messages logged
    Logging to [IP_1]

[HOST_1]#show ntp status
Clock is synchronized, stratum 4, reference is [IP_1]

[HOST_1]#show snmp
SNMP agent enabled
Community strings use restricted views and ACLs

[HOST_1]#show ip ssh

Authentication methods: publickey,password

[HOST_1]#show access-lists
Standard IP access list VTY-MGMT
    10 permit [IP_1], wildcard bits [WILDCARD_1]
